title: Danielle Smith unveils sweeping changes to Alberta's student gender identity, sports and surgery policies
author: Michelle Bellefontaine
notes: Primary SAID source for EVT-032 and SAID context for EVT-033. Smith announced via social media video: puberty blockers and hormone therapy prohibited under 15; parental notification and consent for pronoun and name changes at school; opt-in sex education; transgender athlete restrictions. Smith stated she had 'consulted very broadly' without naming consultees. Bottom surgery for under-17s restated an existing Canada-wide restriction. Author: Michelle Bellefontaine, CBC Edmonton.
